function.message: If this becomes leverage, great. If it becomes more internal ceremony, kill it quickly.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD before entering folders, used canonical entity record for identity, then checked all channel logs as requested.
function.outcome_justification: Elena Weiss identity confirmed in 10_entities/cast/elena.md. Across all channel transcripts, the only message authored by Elena Weiss (author_id entity.elena) is in 60_outbox/channels/dockflow_ops_slack.md dated 2026-04-25, making it the last recorded Elena message.
